settings.title: What can I buy?
settings.text: You can browse packaged business opportunities, template packs, build support options, listed assets, and related advisory products.

settings.title: What can I list?
settings.text: Sellers can prepare business assets, systems, digital properties, content assets, operating assets, or packaged commercial opportunities for review.

settings.title: What happens after enquiry?
settings.text: The enquiry is used to understand fit, budget, timing, pathway, and whether the next step is a product, review, listing, or conversation.

settings.heading: Marketplace frequently asked questions
settings.text: Answers to common questions about Business-In-A-Box offers, asset listings, buyer enquiries, seller pathways, review packs, and marketplace next steps.
